{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032203541369D39CFCF2F2FD61F63B"}"},"total":3596},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7237874645592359720","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常不错，人物描写和细节都很到位而且作者一看就是老司机了[奸笑]还有流行的梗更是承包了我的笑点，不过前期女主角的傲娇属性有点太重，新手看可能不太适应（加更！！）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1685199112,"group_id":"7162190334569483300","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"帅帅的弟弟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6k3DJr8pWGfMklST4DVQ9smIEA/5kQ1PNS3zKe2/+N2","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2608504004150750","user_name":"吃酿尖椒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2608504004150750","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1715011300,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7162190334569483300","book_info":{"abstract":"本书又名：《我魔道少主，抓个正道圣女怎么了？》、《没有修炼天赋的我只好偷偷无敌了》
（无系统、单女主、爽文、日常，轻松，皇朝。）
江邪穿越了，穿越重生为圣元大陆东洲魔道势力的江家少主。
识海中一座神殿，赋予他滴血重生之术以及各种逆天的力量。
六大名器之一的凡尘剑和天道剑相继认他为主。
决定走上巅峰的他做了一个决定：先从抓浩然宗圣女开始……
同年，东洲正道最强宗门浩然宗圣女突然失踪……
而江邪身边则多了一个傲娇叛逆小侍女……
时刻想逃跑的傲娇侍女最终还是沦陷，没有修炼天赋的少年却屡屡震惊众人。
面对这样的江邪，一直跟在他身边的护卫忍不住叹道：“少主实在太神秘了。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5d53e480293bc3d56485ec054bb562df","author":"酥尘","author_id":"","book_id":"7162190334569483300","book_name":"这个少主太过神秘！","book_short_name":"凡尘剑主","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7163534264628150788","read_count":"33663","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1410963"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"609","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,穿越,腹黑,单女主,架空,东方玄幻,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ef2dfcf2fc5f47d8d27350faec84d34d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779306853&x-signature=GXuP9bx2nNscqUXe7xGGfEdwQPE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1126349683304477","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.2469533e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032203541369D39CFCF2F2FD61F63B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":12469,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":12179},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1685199232,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7252738013577429794","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，作者不知道是不是不会写刀（但是伏笔做的可以）全篇上下都没什么刀，有些地方明明可以刀一下来升华一下文章，但是作者没有所以这也是这小说不好的地方，开始还感觉要死要活的，但是后面一看，屁事没有，搞得就很尴尬好吧。
女主人设怎么说呢，也挺好的，死傲娇，让我想起了零之使魔，女主也得老傲娇了[奸笑]
男主怎么说呢，作者想给他营造足智多谋的样子但是就是感觉差点意思，怎么说呢，代打知道吧，有点那味了（其实也不严重）
我觉得没有什么毒点（可能我快修成万毒不侵之体了）
各位道友可以试试，我觉得还挺好看的，女主那死傲娇，和男主那破面子（就因为女主没成年不敢下手）。总体来说挺甜的[吃瓜]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1688659749,"group_id":"7162190334569483300","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"随便写写，全凭兴趣爱好","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N53X1NMW/b+sQEBUBDvTw7jbduSDw/M+xiXI2FLAQ5cV","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/09edf0a9746e4b86aa29729021457f75~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706756&x-signature=TXkNjQiLvLVVyXNDzgqsS6HrT0k%3D","user_id":"4130200754353839","user_name":"我是本本"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4130200754353839","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1766201148,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7162190334569483300","book_info":{"abstract":"本书又名：《我魔道少主，抓个正道圣女怎么了？》、《没有修炼天赋的我只好偷偷无敌了》
